subcodes.first_line: Hadrat-i-Khadim, upon him be the Glory of God the All-Glorious - with heart and soul do I long for him, and night and day do I remember him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت خادم علیه بهاء الله الابهی را بجان و دل مشتاقم و شب و روز بیادشان هستم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
